VAL-BADGE-001.evidence: Demo page screenshot shows all 5 badges: Pending (amber), In Progress (blue), Done (green), Not Confirmed (red), Canceled (gray). No crashes for any status. Unknown statuses render raw string with neutral styling.

VAL-BADGE-002.evidence: Demo page shows side-by-side comparison: 'In Progress' (blue) vs 'Overdue' (red). Visually distinct styling. isOverdueActive helper correctly returns true for in_progress task 5min past due, false for 20min past (beyond grace), false for not-yet-due, false for wrong status, false for null due_at.

VAL-STATUS-004.evidence: Demo page shows isOverdueActive helper test results: in_progress + 5min ago = true (correct), in_progress + 20min ago = false (past grace, correct), in_progress + 1hr future = false (not yet due, correct), pending + 5min ago = false (wrong status, correct), in_progress + null = false (no due_at, correct). All match expected values.

VAL-CROSS-002.evidence: 6 vitest tests pass in cross-area-integration.test.ts: getDueReminders excludes canceled, canceled task never picked up by sendDueReminders, canceled not transitioned by grace period, canceled not in EOD summary, full tick cycle ignores canceled, web-canceled task prevents reminders.

VAL-CROSS-003.evidence: Browser testing confirmed all 4 sidebar links navigate correctly: Dashboard -> /, Todos -> /todos, Messages -> /logs, Settings -> /settings. Uses Next.js Link components (no full page reloads). No console errors on any page.

VAL-LOG-003.evidence: Logs page shows user-visible error 'Failed to load messages' with the specific error message and a 'Try Again' button when Supabase fetch fails. Error is displayed in red box, NOT swallowed silently.

VAL-CROSS-001.blockedBy: Supabase credentials missing - web/.env.local file does not exist. Cannot seed data or verify dashboard reflects backend status changes.

VAL-CROSS-004.blockedBy: Supabase credentials missing - cannot verify empty state with zero data because Supabase client throws before any data can be fetched. Dashboard shows error state, not empty state.

VAL-HOME-005.blockedBy: Supabase credentials missing - cannot verify empty state (shows error instead of empty state).

frictions.description: Supabase .env.local file is missing from web/ directory. Mission states credentials are 'already configured' but the file does not exist on disk. This blocks 19 out of 24 assertions.

blockers.description: web/.env.local file missing - NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY not set. Dashboard shows 'Supabase configuration is missing' error on all data-driven pages.
blockers.rootCause: Environment file web/.env.local was either never created or was deleted. The gitignore excludes .env files so they are not version-controlled.
